title: hypericum mutilum var. boreale
intro: Hypericum mutilum var. boreale, also known as the northern St. John's wort, is a perennial herb belonging to the St. John's wort family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and alleviate symptoms of depression. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hypericum mutilum var. boreale can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected areas.
